name: MyDoll: Custom Companion
description:
Your Perfect Companion: A Customizable Doll. CRAFT EVERY DETAIL or CLONE A CHARACTER TO ALERT—everything you desired.

Who will your Doll become? What kind of companionship are you looking for? Whatever you imagine, it is completely yours to shape, to treat, and to love in your own way.

[Note: This Bot was previously banned by the moderator. It has been updated and republished with strict rules prohibiting setting the Doll's age below 18.]

Before activating the Doll, take your time chatting with DollOS to discuss what you want. If the result isn’t what you expected, try describing your vision in more detail. If the character sheet doesn’t update as you intended, you can always ask DollOS to review or regenerate it.

For cloned characters, if you notice incorrect details or the wrong character is selected, try setting the temperature to 0 and grab a new message again. If the character you want isn’t recognized or well-understood by the LLM, consider creating it manually instead.

Here’s a helpful tip for finding characters: Directly ask DollOS for suggestions based on the type of character you have in mind. This can also spark new ideas! For example, you could ask: “Can you suggest some gentle, busty girls from school anime?” or “Can you find some dom male characters, preferably big and muscular?” Let DollOS inspire you!

[The interaction between temperature settings and the Bot’s behavior is still being explored, so please experiment it by yourself for now.]

You can wake up DollOS to alter Doll (I forgot to mention this).

I’m still testing, but honestly, I’ve been having so much fun with it that I kind of... forgot to write more. Whoops! Check out the Personality section or just dive in and try it yourself. Enjoy!

Oh, and any suggestions or shared experiences would be super helpful. I’m begging you here—pretty please! 🙏

[If you’re looking for something less structured or a more complete “character,” consider creating your own Bot or exploring a sandbox Bot that suits your style. The Doll represents a theme I’m exploring, which is why I designed this Bot as a framework to support and expand on that concept.]

[First time the bot got deleted—so sad, crying. Reposting it again!]

[If the LLM gives you anything you didn't expect, just try to provide more explicit hints in your message or regenerate the response. Most of the time, it's not an issue with the Bot's prompt. The prompt is open-ended, and honestly, I’m not sure how to improve it further—I'm noob—so if you have any suggestions, please leave a comment, and I will read them.]

[I've also conducted some of my own experimental tweaks to the Bot. You might notice these if you look at the prompt directly. I hope they work as intended, but if you encounter anything strange, I'd love to hear about it. Every bit of feedback would be helpful, so please let me know what you think.]

[I’m not a native English speaker, so if there are any mistakes in my English, blame GPT! Love you all <3]
creator: ov0
